reading_units.text: 自誠明，謂之性；自明誠，謂之教。誠則明矣，明則誠矣。

layers.translation_en: When we have intelligence resulting from sincerity, this condition is to be ascribed to nature; when we have sincerity resulting from intelligence, this condition is to be ascribed to instruction.

chapter.text: 自誠明，謂之性；自明誠，謂之教。誠則明矣，明則誠矣。

source_title: 四書章句集注 : 中庸章句
